title: berkheya sphaerocephala
intro: Berkheya sphaerocephala, also known as the Gold Coin Daisy or Cape Dandelion, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. Berkheya sphaerocephala can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional remedies to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
